summary: Model authenticated users and sessions for realistic scans.
examples: Create a read-only user for baseline scans.
Test admin-only endpoints with an admin user.
content:
## Overview
Model authenticated users and sessions for realistic scans.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Users and Authentication Setup (Workflow 20)
steps: Define authentication settings in the context.
Create users with the right credentials.
Run scans as a specific user.
